title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone building a model plane. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A teenage boy is building a model plane at a table in his bedroom. He is carefully joining two small parts together. There are instructions, glue, small tools and model pieces on the table.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.topic: Going for a bike ride in the countryside
tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people riding bicycles in the countryside. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A family is riding bicycles along a country path. The parents are cycling behind two children who are wearing helmets. There are green fields, trees and hills in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
